fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period that you want to view.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the period that you want to view.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the debit entries that have been posted to the account.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the credit entries that have been posted to the account.

fields.name: Net Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net change in the account balance during the time period in the Date Filter field.

fields.name: Budgeted Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the budget debit entries that have been posted to the account.

fields.name: Budgeted Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the budget credit entries that have been posted to the account.

fields.name: Budgeted Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the budget entries that have been posted to the account.

fields.name: Balance/Budget Pct.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a summary of the debit and credit balances and the budgeted amounts for different time periods for the account that you select in the chart of accounts.
